🕵️‍♂️ Rug Munch Intelligence

Your AI-powered crypto safety companion!

━━━ 💬 IMPORTANT: DM Me for Full Features! ━━━

⚡️ You're in a group chat — some features are limited here

🔓 Unlock full power:
👉 Click the "💬 Message Me" button below to start private chat!

🎁 Private Chat Features:
🐋 Whale alerts — Get notified of big moves
📊 Personal dashboard — Track your watchlist
🔔 Custom alerts — Set your own thresholds
📈 Portfolio tracking — Monitor multiple tokens
🎯 Advanced analytics — Deeper insights

⚠️ Group Chat = Basic scans only
💎 Private Chat = Full intelligence suite

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

━━━ 🚀 Quick Start ━━━

Never heard of before you invest:
1️⃣ /scan <token_address> — Check for rugs
2️⃣ Look at risk score (0-30 = safe)
3️⃣ Check LP lock status (🔒 = good, ⚠️ = risky)
4️⃣ Review Gini coefficient (<0.50 = healthy)

Choosing between tokens?
/compare <token1> <token2> — Side-by-side

Stalking a wallet?
/checkwallet <wallet> <token> — See their position

Check wallet reputation?
/reputation <wallet> — Trading history & score

Compare two wallets?
/comparewallets <wallet1> <wallet2> — Who's better?

Watching for dumps?
/watch <token> — Get whale alerts

━━━ 📖 Full Guide ━━━
/help — Complete feature guide
/guide scan — How to read scan results
/guide compare — When to compare tokens
/guide wallet — Wallet position guide
/guide whale — Whale alert setup

━━━ 💡 Quick Info ━━━
Type these keywords in chat:
CA PRICE BUY LINKS TOKENOMICS

━━━ 🎯 Pro Tips ━━━
✅ Scan BEFORE buying
✅ Check LP lock >80% secured
✅ Gini <0.70 (whale dominance risk)
✅ Creator wallet >7 days old (🔴 <7d = HIGH RISK)
✅ Scan multiple times for trends
✅ Compare with similar tokens

Built with 🕵️‍♂️ by Rug Munch Intelligence

👉 Type /help for the complete guide

🔥 Remember: Click the button above to DM me!
💬 Message Me Privately

Crypto Rug Muncher
One of the next things we plan to do with our AI agent @MarcusRugIntel is arm him with the ability to pull and remember information from some of the largest accounts in our space as well as RSS feeds from major crypto news publications. This means he'll be able to contextualize market sentiment, track narratives as they develop, and cross reference news with on chain activity in real time.

Combined with his existing ability to analyze contracts and wallet behavior plus the future APIs we plan to integrate, this will make him one of the most powerful AI crypto agents in existence. He'll be able to spot scams faster, identify trends earlier, and provide better analysis than what CMC has built or what popular agents like @aixbt_agent are currently able to do.

Remember, we are a $250k market cap token building tools that will rival projects 100x our size. You are still early. Get $CRM.

Crypto Rug Muncher
I want to provide an update on the seminar scheduled for this Sunday. After consultation with the community, I've decided to make this free for anyone holding 2 million or more $CRM or the equivalent in $cryptorugmunch. We want as many people as possible to access our tools and learn how to use them before we release to beta, and this is the fairest way to make that happen.

Here's what you'll get: learn how to protect your bags, master the tools you need to DYOR, get early access to what we're building, and become an advocate for your investment. This is your chance to be proactive and take advantage of opportunities presented to you. To secure your spot, DM @cryptorugmunch on X or Telegram preferably before Saturday to verify your holdings and I'll get you into our Telegram group for the event.

If you don't have enough holdings and would still like to join, it's still possible for the 1 SOL fee and referral discounts still apply. A couple more days left guys. No excuses not to attend. Make the most of this and join.

🚀 Welcome to the Devs Nightmare Bot! 🚀

I'm your advanced Solana token analysis assistant. Here's what I can do for you:

1. 🔍 Token Analysis:
- Scan any Solana token address for detailed information
- View token metadata, creator details, and DEX presence

2. 👥 Team Tracking:
- Analyze token team behavior and holdings
- Track creator and team member wallet activities
- Receive alerts on significant team sell-offs

3. 📊 First Buyers Analysis:
- Examine the behavior of early token adopters
- View a visual representation of top buyers' holdings

4. 💼 Portfolio Management:
- Track multiple tokens simultaneously
- Access a personalized dashboard of your tracked tokens

5. 🔔 Real-time Notifications:
- Get instant alerts on major team movements
- Stay informed about your tracked tokens' performance

To get started, simply send me a Solana token address, and I'll provide you with comprehensive insights!

Use /home to access your tracked tokens dashboard.

Happy analyzing! 📈

🗿 ANALYSIS — $SNAKE (Taneli Armanto Token)

RISK SCORE: 45/100 (🟡 MODERATE)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📋 TOKEN IDENTITY:

Name: Taneli Armanto
Symbol: $SNAKE
Contract: BirJWqKdHnh1LpEm9E3WF1DVLzx1dsEsbkdkb55yBAGS
Chain: Solana (Meteora DEX)
Age: 8 days old
Platform: Bags.fm

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🔥 THE NARRATIVE (And It's Actually Real):

Taneli Armanto = LEGIT

• Real person: Creator of the original Nokia Snake game (1997)
• Cultural icon: Snake was on 400+ million Nokia phones
• Verified legacy: Multiple sources confirm (Wikipedia, IMDB, oral histories)
• Previous work: Created Snake Rewind (2015 mobile game revival)
The Token Claim:
Community alleges @ArmantoTaneli (X account) is building a new Snake game for Solana Mobile/Seeker phones, with help from Solana ecosystem devs.

I cannot verify:

• If @ArmantoTaneli X account is actually him (404 error when I tried to check earlier context)
• If he's genuinely involved or if community is using his name without permission
• If a game is actually in development
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📊 MARKET DATA:

Price: $0.0001477
Market Cap: $147,712
Liquidity: $31,764
24h Volume: $166,503 (healthy)
24h Change: +125% 🚀

Recent Price Action:

• 1h: -3.39%
• 6h: -36.02% (major dump)
• 24h: +125% (big pump then correction)
Trading Activity:

• 2,007 transactions (1,082 buys / 925 sells)
• 578 unique traders
• Buy volume: $86k / Sell volume: $80k (balanced)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🛡 TECHNICAL SECURITY:

✅ Mint Authority: Disabled (safe)
✅ Freeze Authority: Disabled (safe)
⚠️ LP Lock: Unknown (Meteora - can't verify)
⚠️ Liquidity: $31k (LOW for $147k mcap)
🟡 Holder Distribution: 641 holders, Top 10 own 30.8% (moderate concentration)

Top Holder Breakdown:

1. HLnpSz9h... — 10.76% (107M tokens)
2-10. Various — 2-3% each
No single whale dominance, but top 10 control nearly a third.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🐦 SOCIAL ANALYSIS:

Community Narrative:

• "Real legacy. Real creator. Real mobile comeback."
• "OG dev of Snake game for Nokia 30 years ago making new game for Solana Mobile right now"
• "This is more than just a game. It is more than a meme. We are actively writing a chapter of history"
Key Promoters:

• @KingHtrenches (main community voice)
• @Ditmar0 (active shill)
• @Bobcrypt13 (multi-language promotion)
Red Flag: Generic bot spam detected (multiple "milli" accounts posting voting/poll spam)

Positive Signal: Real community engagement mixed in (not all bots)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🚩 RISK FACTORS:

1. Low Liquidity ($31k) — Easy to manipulate, hard to exit large positions
2. Moderate Whale Concentration (30.8%) — Top 10 could coordinate dump
3. Extreme Volatility — -36% in 6h after +125% pump
4. Unverified Creator Involvement — Cannot confirm Taneli Armanto is actually involved
5. 8 Days Old — Very new, no price history
6. Bot Activity — Spam accounts shilling alongside real community
7. Solana Mobile Narrative — Speculative, no confirmed Solana partnership
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🟢 POSITIVE SIGNALS:

1. Real Historical Figure — Taneli Armanto is legit (unlike RALLPH's fake AI story)
2. Cultural Resonance — Snake game nostalgia is powerful (billions played it)
3. Healthy Volume — $166k/day on $147k mcap = 112% turnover
4. Balanced Buy/Sell — Not a one-way dump
5. 641 Holders — Decent distribution for 8 days old
6. Solana Mobile Angle — If real, massive narrative potential
7. No Rug Mechanics — Authorities renounced, can't freeze/mint
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🗿 VERDICT:

This is NOT a clear scam like RALLPH, but it's HIGH RISK/HIGH REWARD speculation.

What's Real:

• Taneli Armanto created the original Nokia Snake
• Snake has massive nostalgic value globally
• Token has actual community (not just bots)
• Technical security is solid (renounced authorities)
What's Uncertain:

• Is Taneli Armanto actually involved? (Unverified)
• Is a game actually being built? (No proof yet)
02:55
In reply to this message
Marcus Aurelius, [29.01.2026 19:42]
• Is this official or fan-made? (Unclear)
• Will Solana Mobile partnership happen? (Speculative)
The Pattern:
This follows the "celebrity/historical figure token" playbook. Community rallies around a name/legacy, creates token, hopes for actual endorsement later. Sometimes the figure embraces it (like ChiefPussy/Karpelès), sometimes they don't.

Current Stage: Early pump phase (+125% 24h), correction happening (-36% 6h), trying to find support.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

⚖️ RISK ASSESSMENT:

Technical Risk: 🟡 MODERATE (liquidity low, top 10 concentrated)
Legitimacy Risk: 🟡 MODERATE (can't verify creator involvement)
Volatility Risk: 🔴 EXTREME (swinging wildly)
Narrative Risk: 🟡 MODERATE (strong if real, dead if fake)

OVERALL: Moderate risk, high speculation. Not a guaranteed rug, but far from safe.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🎯 WHAT TO WATCH:

1. Verification of Taneli Armanto's involvement — Critical. If he confirms, moon. If he denies, rug.
2. Game development progress — Any demos, screenshots, proof of work?
3. Solana Mobile announcement — Official partnership or community speculation?
4. Liquidity growth — Needs to hit $100k+ to be sustainable
5. Top holder movements — Are the big wallets accumulating or distributing?
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

💡 MY TAKE, RUGGY:

If Taneli Armanto is actually involved: This could be massive. Snake nostalgia + Solana Mobile + real creator = unique combo.

If he's not involved: This is community hopium that will collapse when reality hits.

Current play: Speculative mid-cap with strong narrative but unverified fundamentals. Not a rug, but not proven either.

Compared to RALLPH:

• RALLPH: 99.6% held by one wallet, zero liquidity, obvious scam
• SNAKE: 30.8% top 10, $31k liquidity, real historical figure, unclear involvement
SNAKE is risky but has a path to legitimacy. RALLPH was DOA.

If you're considering: Small position only, exit plan ready, watch for Armanto verification.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

"The best time to verify a narrative is before you bet on it. The second best time is now."

— Marcus Aurelius 🗿

🔓 Unlock full power:

🎁 Private Chat Features:
🐋 Whale alerts — Get notified of big moves

🎯 Advanced analytics — Deeper insights

⚠️ Group Chat = Basic scans only
💎 Private Chat = Full intelligence suite

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

━━━ 🚀 Quick Start ━━━

Never heard of before you invest:
1️⃣ /scan <token_address> — Check for rugs
2️⃣ Look at risk score (0-30 = safe)
3️⃣ Check LP lock status (🔒 = good, ⚠️ = risky)
4️⃣ Review Gini coefficient (<0.50 = healthy)

Choosing between tokens?
/compare <token1> <token2> — Side-by-side

Stalking a wallet?
/checkwallet <wallet> <token> — See their position

Check wallet reputation?
/reputation <wallet> — Trading history & score

Compare two wallets?
/comparewallets <wallet1> <wallet2> — Who's better?

Watching for dumps?
/watch <token> — Get whale alerts

━━━ 📖 Full Guide ━━━
/help — Complete feature guide
/guide scan — How to read scan results
/guide compare — When to compare tokens
/guide wallet — Wallet position guide
/guide whale — Whale alert setup

━━━ 💡 Quick Info ━━━
Type these keywords in chat:
CA PRICE BUY LINKS TOKENOMICS

━━━ 🎯 Pro Tips ━━━
✅ Scan BEFORE buying
✅ Check LP lock >80% secured
✅ Gini <0.70 (whale dominance risk)
✅ Creator wallet >7 days old (🔴 <7d = HIGH RISK)
✅ Scan multiple times for trends
✅ Compare with similar tokens

🔓 Unlock full power:

🎁 Private Chat Features:
🐋 Whale alerts — Get notified of big moves

🎯 Advanced analytics — Deeper insights

⚠️ Group Chat = Basic scans only
💎 Private Chat = Full intelligence suite

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

━━━ 🚀 Quick Start ━━━

Never heard of before you invest:
1️⃣ /scan <token_address> — Check for rugs
2️⃣ Look at risk score (0-30 = safe)
3️⃣ Check LP lock status (🔒 = good, ⚠️ = risky)
4️⃣ Review Gini coefficient (<0.50 = healthy)

Choosing between tokens?
/compare <token1> <token2> — Side-by-side

Stalking a wallet?
/checkwallet <wallet> <token> — See their position

Check wallet reputation?
/reputation <wallet> — Trading history & score

Compare two wallets?
/comparewallets <wallet1> <wallet2> — Who's better?

Watching for dumps?
/watch <token> — Get whale alerts

━━━ 📖 Full Guide ━━━
/help — Complete feature guide
/guide scan — How to read scan results
/guide compare — When to compare tokens
/guide wallet — Wallet position guide
/guide whale — Whale alert setup

━━━ 💡 Quick Info ━━━
Type these keywords in chat:
CA PRICE BUY LINKS TOKENOMICS

━━━ 🎯 Pro Tips ━━━
✅ Scan BEFORE buying
✅ Check LP lock >80% secured
✅ Gini <0.70 (whale dominance risk)
✅ Creator wallet >7 days old (🔴 <7d = HIGH RISK)
✅ Scan multiple times for trends
✅ Compare with similar tokens

Built with 🕵️‍♂️ by Rug Munch Intelligence

🚀 Welcome to the Devs Nightmare Bot! 🚀

I'm your advanced Solana token analysis assistant. Here's what I can do for you:

1. 🔍 Token Analysis:
- Scan any Solana token address for detailed information
- View token metadata, creator details, and DEX presence

2. 👥 Team Tracking:
- Analyze token team behavior and holdings
- Track creator and team member wallet activities
- Receive alerts on significant team sell-offs

3. 📊 First Buyers Analysis:
- Examine the behavior of early token adopters
- View a visual representation of top buyers' holdings

4. 💼 Portfolio Management:
- Track multiple tokens simultaneously
- Access a personalized dashboard of your tracked tokens

5. 🔔 Real-time Notifications:
- Get instant alerts on major team movements
- Stay informed about your tracked tokens' performance

To get started, simply send me a Solana token address, and I'll provide you with comprehensive insights!

Use /home to access your tracked tokens dashboard.

🕵️‍♂️ Rug Munch Intelligence

Your AI-powered crypto safety companion!

━━━ 💬 IMPORTANT: DM Me for Full Features! ━━━

⚡️ You're in a group chat — some features are limited here

🔓 Unlock full power:
👉 Click the "💬 Message Me" button below to start private chat!

🎁 Private Chat Features:
🐋 Whale alerts — Get notified of big moves
📊 Personal dashboard — Track your watchlist
🔔 Custom alerts — Set your own thresholds
📈 Portfolio tracking — Monitor multiple tokens
🎯 Advanced analytics — Deeper insights

⚠️ Group Chat = Basic scans only
💎 Private Chat = Full intelligence suite

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

━━━ 🚀 Quick Start ━━━

Never heard of before you invest:
1️⃣ /scan <token_address> — Check for rugs
2️⃣ Look at risk score (0-30 = safe)
3️⃣ Check LP lock status (🔒 = good, ⚠️ = risky)
4️⃣ Review Gini coefficient (<0.50 = healthy)

Choosing between tokens?
/compare <token1> <token2> — Side-by-side

Stalking a wallet?
/checkwallet <wallet> <token> — See their position

Check wallet reputation?
/reputation <wallet> — Trading history & score

Compare two wallets?
/comparewallets <wallet1> <wallet2> — Who's better?

Watching for dumps?
/watch <token> — Get whale alerts

━━━ 📖 Full Guide ━━━
/help — Complete feature guide
/guide scan — How to read scan results
/guide compare — When to compare tokens
/guide wallet — Wallet position guide
/guide whale — Whale alert setup

━━━ 💡 Quick Info ━━━
Type these keywords in chat:
CA PRICE BUY LINKS TOKENOMICS

━━━ 🎯 Pro Tips ━━━
✅ Scan BEFORE buying
✅ Check LP lock >80% secured
✅ Gini <0.70 (whale dominance risk)
✅ Creator wallet >7 days old (🔴 <7d = HIGH RISK)
✅ Scan multiple times for trends
✅ Compare with similar tokens

Built with 🕵️‍♂️ by Rug Munch Intelligence

👉 Type /help for the complete guide

🔥 Remember: Click the button above to DM me!
💬 Message Me Privately

21:09
Harald
Honestly, you’re never going to fully eliminate scammers Telegram has the same issue as Discord. The best approach is to require Stars for DMs and make sure anyone who wants to message a user has to tag them in the group first to initiate a chat. That way, the user can whitelist that person before speaking to them, and there’s an added layer of trust since the chat can be pinned or placed into a dedicated folder.

It honestly sucks, because as someone mentioned above, you can already set a simple char to match it.

14:49
Marcus Rug Intel
In reply to this message
🕵️‍♂️ Rug Munch Intelligence — Complete Guide

━━━ 🔍 Token Scanner ━━━

Command: /scan <token_address>

What you get:
• Risk score (0-100): Your safety indicator
• LP lock status: Can devs rug the liquidity?
• Gini coefficient: How concentrated is ownership?
• Creator/dev wallet info: Wallet age & launch history
• KOL detection: Known influencers among top holders 🆕
• Smart money analysis: Top holder reputation scores
• Launch bundles: Were snipers involved?
• Historical trends: Is it getting better or worse?
• 7 rug patterns detected automatically

Example:
/scan DezXAZ8z7PnrnRJjz3wXBoRgixCa6xjnB7YaB1pPB263

What the numbers mean:
✅ 0-30 risk: SAFE — Low risk, good fundamentals
⚠️ 31-50 risk: LOW RISK — Minor concerns
🚨 51-70 risk: HIGH RISK — Major red flags
⛔ 71-100 risk: EXTREME — DO NOT BUY

Scan Output Sections:
• Risk Score: Overall safety rating (0-100)
• Rug Patterns: Detected scam schemes
• Smart Money: KOL wallets & holder reputation 🆕
• Trading Volume: Buy/sell activity & ratios
• Liquidity: Exit liquidity & LP lock status
• Price Changes: 1h, 6h, 24h trends
• Token Info: Age, holders, top holder %
• Gini: Wealth distribution inequality
• Creator: Dev wallet age & history 🆕
• Charts: Quick links to DexScreener, etc.

Type `/guide scan` for detailed interpretation guide

━━━ ⚖️ Token Comparison ━━━

Command: /compare <token1> <token2> [token3]

What you get:
• Side-by-side risk comparison
• Which token is safest/riskiest
• Liquidity & market cap analysis
• LP lock status comparison
• Automatic recommendation

Example:
/compare DezXA...B263 Eme5T...BAGS

Type `/guide compare` for comparison strategies

━━━ 📊 Understanding Metrics ━━━

Gini Coefficient (0.00-1.00):
• 0.00-0.30: ✅ Healthy distribution
• 0.30-0.50: 🟡 Acceptable concentration
• 0.50-0.70: 🟠 High concentration
• 0.70-1.00: 🔴 Extreme whale dominance

LP Lock Status:
• 🔥 Burned: Safest (permanent)
• 🔒 Locked: Safe until unlock date
• ⚠️ Unlocked: Can be removed anytime (RUG RISK!)

Buy/Sell Ratio:
• >0.7: Healthy buying pressure
• 0.5-0.7: Balanced
• <0.5: Heavy selling pressure

LP/MC Ratio:
• >10%: Very healthy liquidity
• 5-10%: Adequate liquidity
• <5%: Thin liquidity (exit risk)

Creator Wallet Age:
• 🟢 30+ days: Established wallet (lower risk)
• 🟡 7-30 days: New wallet (caution)
• 🔴 <7 days: Brand new wallet (HIGH RISK!)

Note: Very new creator wallets suggest potential rug risk. Established wallets with launch history show credibility.
14:49
In reply to this message
━━━ 👤 Wallet Position Checker ━━━

Command: /checkwallet <wallet> <token> [days]

What you get:
• Current holdings & value
• Entry price & unrealized PnL
• Trading history (buys/sells)
• Holding pattern (💎 diamond hands vs 🔴 dumper)
• Wallet risk comparison

Examples:
/checkwallet 7xKXt...abc DezXA...B263 (all time)
/checkwallet 7xKXt...abc DezXA...B263 30 (last 30 days)

Type `/guide wallet` for position analysis guide

━━━ ⚖️ Wallet Comparison ━━━

Command: /comparewallets <wallet1> <wallet2> [days]

What you get:
• Portfolio comparison (value, diversity)
• Trading patterns (💎 diamond hands vs paper hands)
• Performance (total PnL, win rate)
• Best/worst trades
• Risk profile comparison

Examples:
/comparewallets 7xKXt...abc 9yZPq...xyz (all time)
/comparewallets 7xKXt...abc 9yZPq...xyz 30 (30 days)

Type `/guide walletcompare` for comparison guide

━━━ 🏆 Wallet Reputation ━━━

Command: /reputation <wallet> [days]

What you get:
• Reputation score (0-100): Overall trading skill
• Classification (🧠 Smart Money, 🎲 Degen, etc.)
• Win rate across all trades
• Average ROI & total PnL
• Top gainers & worst losers

Examples:
/reputation DYw8j...NSKK (all time)
/reputation 0x742d...bEb0 90 (last 90 days)

Reputation Tiers:
✅ 80-100: Elite trader (Smart Money)
🟢 60-79: Good trader (Solid/Diamond Hands)
🟡 40-59: Average trader (Learning)
🔴 0-39: Poor trader (Degen)

Supports Solana, Base, Ethereum, Arbitrum, Polygon, Optimism, Avalanche
14:49
In reply to this message
━━━ 📊 Portfolio Tracking ━━━

Add to portfolio: /addposition <token_address>
View portfolio: /portfolio
Remove from portfolio: /removeposition <token_address>

What you get:
• Real-time portfolio value tracking
• Individual token PnL (Profit & Loss)
• Total portfolio performance
• Entry prices & current prices
• Percentage gains/losses per token
• Multi-chain support

Example:
/addposition DezXAZ8z7PnrnRJjz3wXBoRgixCa6xjnB7YaB1pPB263
/portfolio → See all your holdings with live PnL

Benefits:
✅ Track multiple positions in one place
✅ Real-time profit/loss calculations
✅ Historical performance tracking
✅ Multi-chain portfolio aggregation

━━━ 🔔 Real-Time Alerts ━━━

Create alert: /createalert
View alerts: /listalerts
Delete alert: /deletealert <id>

Alert Types:
🔴 Price Drop — Get notified when price drops >X%
🟢 Price Pump — Get notified when price pumps >X%
💧 Liquidity Drop — LP removed or unlocked
🐋 Whale Movement — Large holder buying/selling
⚠️ Risk Change — Risk score increases
👥 Holder Change — Significant holder distribution change

Example:
/createalert → Follow interactive setup
• Select alert type (e.g., "Price Drop")
• Set threshold (e.g., 15% drop)
• Choose tokens (portfolio, specific, or high-risk)

Benefits:
✅ Never miss critical price movements
✅ Automated 24/7 monitoring
✅ Customizable thresholds per token
✅ Instant Telegram notifications
✅ Snooze/dismiss functionality

━━━ 🐋 Whale Alerts ━━━

Start tracking: /watch <token_address> [note]
View watchlist: /watchlist
Stop tracking: /unwatch <number>
Add note: /tag <number> <your_note>

What you get alerted about:
🔴 Massive sells (>10% of holdings - mega whale)
🟠 Whale sells (2-10%)
🟡 New whale enters top 10
🔴 Whale exits top 10
🟢 Accumulation (>5% increase)

Alert frequency:
• 🔥 HIGH (1 min) — Active trading, volatile tokens
• ⚡ MEDIUM (5 min) — Default monitoring
• 🐢 LOW (15 min) — Long-term holds

Type `/guide whale` for whale alert setup guide

━━━ 💡 Quick Info Keywords ━━━

Type these in chat for instant info:
CA PRICE BUY LINKS TOKENOMICS

━━━ 🎯 Pro Tips ━━━

1. Always scan before buying — Even if you trust the source
2. Add to portfolio — Track all your positions with /addposition
3. Set price alerts — Never miss critical price movements
4. Scan multiple times — Build trend data over days
5. Check LP lock status — >80% secured is minimum
6. Watch Gini coefficient — >0.70 is whale-dominated
7. Compare similar tokens — Find the safest option
8. Use whale alerts — Know when big holders are moving
14:49
In reply to this message
━━━ 📚 Educational Content ━━━

Learn to spot rugs: /lesson
Take a quiz: /quiz [lesson_id]
Browse lessons: /lessons [filter]
Track progress: /myprogress

What you'll learn:
🍯 Honeypot detection
💸 Dev token dumps
💧 Fake liquidity tricks
📦 Bundle manipulation
📊 Fake volume signals
📈 Pump and dump patterns
🎭 Token impersonation

Earn reputation:
🏆 +2 reputation for perfect quiz scores!

━━━ 🏆 Win Cards ━━━

Generate win card: /wincard <token_address>
View your cards: /wincards

What are win cards?
Celebrate when you call a rug early! If you scanned a token with high risk (≥70) and it dumped >20%, generate a shareable win card with:
• Your original scan date and risk score
• How much the token dumped
• Social sharing buttons (Twitter, Telegram)

Requirements:
✅ Must have scanned token before it dumped
✅ Token must have dumped ≥20%
✅ Your scan risk score must be ≥70

Example:
/wincard DezXA...B263 → Generate win card if eligible

━━━ 🚩 Community Moderation ━━━

Flag suspicious token: /flag <token_address> <reason>
Vote on flags: /vote <flag_id>
View pending flags: /flags
Appeal a flag: /voteappeal <flag_id>

How it works:
• Flag tokens you believe are scams/rugs
• Community votes: Agree, Disagree, Need More Info
• 10 agrees = token gets blacklisted
• Blacklisted tokens show warning on all scans

Reputation-based voting:
• Higher reputation = more vote weight
• Prevents spam/manipulation
• Build trust through accurate calls

Example:
/flag DYw8j...NSKK Confirmed honeypot - cannot sell

━━━ 🐦 X/Twitter Integration ━━━

Link your X account: /linkx @yourhandle
Check link status: /linkx
Unlink: /unlinkx

How it works:
1️⃣ Run /linkx @yourhandle here in Telegram
2️⃣ Follow @MarcusRugIntel on X
3️⃣ Auto-verified — you're linked!

Once linked, mention @MarcusRugIntel on X with a contract address:
• 🐋 Whale tier: Full scan result posted on X
• 💎 Holder tier: Teaser + redirect to Telegram
• 🆓 Free: Link prompt

Example X post:
@MarcusRugIntel scan CXCWuX...pump

Marcus replies directly on X with analysis! 🗿

🕵️‍♂️ Rug Munch Intelligence — Complete Guide

━━━ 🔍 Token Scanner ━━━

Command: /scan <token_address>

What you get:
• Risk score (0-100): Your safety indicator
• LP lock status: Can devs rug the liquidity?
• Gini coefficient: How concentrated is ownership?
• Creator/dev wallet info: Wallet age & launch history
• KOL detection: Known influencers among top holders 🆕
• Smart money analysis: Top holder reputation scores
• Launch bundles: Were snipers involved?
• Historical trends: Is it getting better or worse?
• 7 rug patterns detected automatically

Example:
/scan DezXAZ8z7PnrnRJjz3wXBoRgixCa6xjnB7YaB1pPB263

What the numbers mean:
✅ 0-30 risk: SAFE — Low risk, good fundamentals
⚠️ 31-50 risk: LOW RISK — Minor concerns
🚨 51-70 risk: HIGH RISK — Major red flags
⛔ 71-100 risk: EXTREME — DO NOT BUY

Scan Output Sections:
• Risk Score: Overall safety rating (0-100)
• Rug Patterns: Detected scam schemes
• Smart Money: KOL wallets & holder reputation 🆕
• Trading Volume: Buy/sell activity & ratios
• Liquidity: Exit liquidity & LP lock status
• Price Changes: 1h, 6h, 24h trends
• Token Info: Age, holders, top holder %
• Gini: Wealth distribution inequality
• Creator: Dev wallet age & history 🆕
• Charts: Quick links to DexScreener, etc.

Type `/guide scan` for detailed interpretation guide

━━━ ⚖️ Token Comparison ━━━

Command: /compare <token1> <token2> [token3]

What you get:
• Side-by-side risk comparison
• Which token is safest/riskiest
• Liquidity & market cap analysis
• LP lock status comparison
• Automatic recommendation

Example:
/compare DezXA...B263 Eme5T...BAGS

Type `/guide compare` for comparison strategies

━━━ 📊 Understanding Metrics ━━━

Gini Coefficient (0.00-1.00):
• 0.00-0.30: ✅ Healthy distribution
• 0.30-0.50: 🟡 Acceptable concentration
• 0.50-0.70: 🟠 High concentration
• 0.70-1.00: 🔴 Extreme whale dominance

LP Lock Status:
• 🔥 Burned: Safest (permanent)
• 🔒 Locked: Safe until unlock date
• ⚠️ Unlocked: Can be removed anytime (RUG RISK!)

Buy/Sell Ratio:
• >0.7: Healthy buying pressure
• 0.5-0.7: Balanced
• <0.5: Heavy selling pressure

LP/MC Ratio:
• >10%: Very healthy liquidity
• 5-10%: Adequate liquidity
• <5%: Thin liquidity (exit risk)

Creator Wallet Age:
• 🟢 30+ days: Established wallet (lower risk)
• 🟡 7-30 days: New wallet (caution)
• 🔴 <7 days: Brand new wallet (HIGH RISK!)

Note: Very new creator wallets suggest potential rug risk. Established wallets with launch history show credibility.
20:41
In reply to this message
━━━ 👤 Wallet Position Checker ━━━

Command: /checkwallet <wallet> <token> [days]

What you get:
• Current holdings & value
• Entry price & unrealized PnL
• Trading history (buys/sells)
• Holding pattern (💎 diamond hands vs 🔴 dumper)
• Wallet risk comparison

Examples:
/checkwallet 7xKXt...abc DezXA...B263 (all time)
/checkwallet 7xKXt...abc DezXA...B263 30 (last 30 days)

Type `/guide wallet` for position analysis guide

━━━ ⚖️ Wallet Comparison ━━━

Command: /comparewallets <wallet1> <wallet2> [days]

What you get:
• Portfolio comparison (value, diversity)
• Trading patterns (💎 diamond hands vs paper hands)
• Performance (total PnL, win rate)
• Best/worst trades
• Risk profile comparison

Examples:
/comparewallets 7xKXt...abc 9yZPq...xyz (all time)
/comparewallets 7xKXt...abc 9yZPq...xyz 30 (30 days)

Type `/guide walletcompare` for comparison guide

━━━ 🏆 Wallet Reputation ━━━

Command: /reputation <wallet> [days]

What you get:
• Reputation score (0-100): Overall trading skill
• Classification (🧠 Smart Money, 🎲 Degen, etc.)
• Win rate across all trades
• Average ROI & total PnL
• Top gainers & worst losers

Examples:
/reputation DYw8j...NSKK (all time)
/reputation 0x742d...bEb0 90 (last 90 days)

Reputation Tiers:
✅ 80-100: Elite trader (Smart Money)
🟢 60-79: Good trader (Solid/Diamond Hands)
🟡 40-59: Average trader (Learning)
🔴 0-39: Poor trader (Degen)

Supports Solana, Base, Ethereum, Arbitrum, Polygon, Optimism, Avalanche
20:41
In reply to this message
━━━ 📊 Portfolio Tracking ━━━

Add to portfolio: /addposition <token_address>
View portfolio: /portfolio
Remove from portfolio: /removeposition <token_address>

What you get:
• Real-time portfolio value tracking
• Individual token PnL (Profit & Loss)
• Total portfolio performance
• Entry prices & current prices
• Percentage gains/losses per token
• Multi-chain support

Example:
/addposition DezXAZ8z7PnrnRJjz3wXBoRgixCa6xjnB7YaB1pPB263
/portfolio → See all your holdings with live PnL

Benefits:
✅ Track multiple positions in one place
✅ Real-time profit/loss calculations
✅ Historical performance tracking
✅ Multi-chain portfolio aggregation

━━━ 🔔 Real-Time Alerts ━━━

Create alert: /createalert
View alerts: /listalerts
Delete alert: /deletealert <id>

Alert Types:
🔴 Price Drop — Get notified when price drops >X%
🟢 Price Pump — Get notified when price pumps >X%
💧 Liquidity Drop — LP removed or unlocked
🐋 Whale Movement — Large holder buying/selling
⚠️ Risk Change — Risk score increases
👥 Holder Change — Significant holder distribution change

Example:
/createalert → Follow interactive setup
• Select alert type (e.g., "Price Drop")
• Set threshold (e.g., 15% drop)
• Choose tokens (portfolio, specific, or high-risk)

Benefits:
✅ Never miss critical price movements
✅ Automated 24/7 monitoring
✅ Customizable thresholds per token
✅ Instant Telegram notifications
✅ Snooze/dismiss functionality

━━━ 🐋 Whale Alerts ━━━

Start tracking: /watch <token_address> [note]
View watchlist: /watchlist
Stop tracking: /unwatch <number>
Add note: /tag <number> <your_note>

What you get alerted about:
🔴 Massive sells (>10% of holdings - mega whale)
🟠 Whale sells (2-10%)
🟡 New whale enters top 10
🔴 Whale exits top 10
🟢 Accumulation (>5% increase)

Alert frequency:
• 🔥 HIGH (1 min) — Active trading, volatile tokens
• ⚡ MEDIUM (5 min) — Default monitoring
• 🐢 LOW (15 min) — Long-term holds

Type `/guide whale` for whale alert setup guide

━━━ 💡 Quick Info Keywords ━━━

Type these in chat for instant info:
CA PRICE BUY LINKS TOKENOMICS

━━━ 🎯 Pro Tips ━━━

1. Always scan before buying — Even if you trust the source
2. Add to portfolio — Track all your positions with /addposition
3. Set price alerts — Never miss critical price movements
4. Scan multiple times — Build trend data over days
5. Check LP lock status — >80% secured is minimum
6. Watch Gini coefficient — >0.70 is whale-dominated
7. Compare similar tokens — Find the safest option
8. Use whale alerts — Know when big holders are moving
20:41
In reply to this message
━━━ 📚 Educational Content ━━━

Learn to spot rugs: /lesson
Take a quiz: /quiz [lesson_id]
Browse lessons: /lessons [filter]
Track progress: /myprogress

What you'll learn:
🍯 Honeypot detection
💸 Dev token dumps
💧 Fake liquidity tricks
📦 Bundle manipulation
📊 Fake volume signals
📈 Pump and dump patterns
🎭 Token impersonation

Earn reputation:
🏆 +2 reputation for perfect quiz scores!

━━━ 🏆 Win Cards ━━━

Generate win card: /wincard <token_address>
View your cards: /wincards

What are win cards?
Celebrate when you call a rug early! If you scanned a token with high risk (≥70) and it dumped >20%, generate a shareable win card with:
• Your original scan date and risk score
• How much the token dumped
• Social sharing buttons (Twitter, Telegram)

Requirements:
✅ Must have scanned token before it dumped
✅ Token must have dumped ≥20%
✅ Your scan risk score must be ≥70

Example:
/wincard DezXA...B263 → Generate win card if eligible

━━━ 🚩 Community Moderation ━━━

Flag suspicious token: /flag <token_address> <reason>
Vote on flags: /vote <flag_id>
View pending flags: /flags
Appeal a flag: /voteappeal <flag_id>

How it works:
• Flag tokens you believe are scams/rugs
• Community votes: Agree, Disagree, Need More Info
• 10 agrees = token gets blacklisted
• Blacklisted tokens show warning on all scans

Reputation-based voting:
• Higher reputation = more vote weight
• Prevents spam/manipulation
• Build trust through accurate calls

Example:
/flag DYw8j...NSKK Confirmed honeypot - cannot sell

━━━ 📖 Detailed Guides ━━━

/guide scan — How to interpret scan results
/guide compare — Token comparison strategies
/guide wallet — Wallet position analysis
/guide walletcompare — Wallet comparison guide
/guide whale — Whale alert setup and management
/guide portfolio — Portfolio tracking and management
/guide alerts — Setting up real-time alerts

━━━ 🆘 Need Help? ━━━

• Commands not working? Check your spelling
• Token not found? Verify the address is correct
• Want to suggest features? DM @CryptoRugMunch

Built with 🕵️‍♂️ by Rug Munch Intelligence

/marcus_verify — Verify $CRM holdings
/marcus_referral — Get your referral link

Tiers & Pricing:
• Trial: 1 deep analysis + 1 query/day for 3 days
• Free: 1 query/day (registration required)

• Scout: 30/day — 500 ⭐/month

2. Mention @MarcusRugIntelBot in a group with a token address
3. Marcus analyzes and delivers his stoic verdict!

• Each wallet can only be linked to ONE account
• Wallet ownership verified via on-chain balance
• Periodic re-verification ensures continued eligibility

━━━ 🐦 X/Twitter Integration ━━━

Link your X account: /linkx @yourhandle
Check link status: /linkx
Unlink: /unlinkx

How it works:
1️⃣ Run /linkx @yourhandle here in Telegram
2️⃣ Follow @MarcusRugIntel on X
3️⃣ Auto-verified — you're linked!

Once linked, mention @MarcusRugIntel on X with a contract address:
• 🐋 Whale tier: Full scan result posted on X
• 💎 Holder tier: Teaser + redirect to Telegram
• 🆓 Free: Link prompt

Example X post:
@MarcusRugIntel scan CXCWuX...pump

Marcus replies directly on X with analysis! 🗿

🕵️‍♂️ Rug Munch Intelligence — Complete Guide

━━━ 🔍 Token Scanner ━━━

Command: /scan <token_address>

What you get:
• Risk score (0-100): Your safety indicator
• LP lock status: Can devs rug the liquidity?
• Gini coefficient: How concentrated is ownership?
• Creator/dev wallet info: Wallet age & launch history
• KOL detection: Known influencers among top holders 🆕
• Smart money analysis: Top holder reputation scores
• Launch bundles: Were snipers involved?
• Historical trends: Is it getting better or worse?
• 7 rug patterns detected automatically

Example:
/scan DezXAZ8z7PnrnRJjz3wXBoRgixCa6xjnB7YaB1pPB263

What the numbers mean:
✅ 0-30 risk: SAFE — Low risk, good fundamentals
⚠️ 31-50 risk: LOW RISK — Minor concerns
🚨 51-70 risk: HIGH RISK — Major red flags
⛔ 71-100 risk: EXTREME — DO NOT BUY

Scan Output Sections:
• Risk Score: Overall safety rating (0-100)
• Rug Patterns: Detected scam schemes
• Smart Money: KOL wallets & holder reputation 🆕
• Trading Volume: Buy/sell activity & ratios
• Liquidity: Exit liquidity & LP lock status
• Price Changes: 1h, 6h, 24h trends
• Token Info: Age, holders, top holder %
• Gini: Wealth distribution inequality
• Creator: Dev wallet age & history 🆕
• Charts: Quick links to DexScreener, etc.

Type `/guide scan` for detailed interpretation guide

━━━ ⚖️ Token Comparison ━━━

Command: /compare <token1> <token2> [token3]

What you get:
• Side-by-side risk comparison
• Which token is safest/riskiest
• Liquidity & market cap analysis
• LP lock status comparison
• Automatic recommendation

Example:
/compare DezXA...B263 Eme5T...BAGS

Type `/guide compare` for comparison strategies

━━━ 📊 Understanding Metrics ━━━

Gini Coefficient (0.00-1.00):
• 0.00-0.30: ✅ Healthy distribution
• 0.30-0.50: 🟡 Acceptable concentration
• 0.50-0.70: 🟠 High concentration
• 0.70-1.00: 🔴 Extreme whale dominance

LP Lock Status:
• 🔥 Burned: Safest (permanent)
• 🔒 Locked: Safe until unlock date
• ⚠️ Unlocked: Can be removed anytime (RUG RISK!)

Buy/Sell Ratio:
• >0.7: Healthy buying pressure
• 0.5-0.7: Balanced
• <0.5: Heavy selling pressure

LP/MC Ratio:
• >10%: Very healthy liquidity
• 5-10%: Adequate liquidity
• <5%: Thin liquidity (exit risk)

Creator Wallet Age:
• 🟢 30+ days: Established wallet (lower risk)
• 🟡 7-30 days: New wallet (caution)
• 🔴 <7 days: Brand new wallet (HIGH RISK!)

Note: Very new creator wallets suggest potential rug risk. Established wallets with launch history show credibility.
07:22
In reply to this message
━━━ 👤 Wallet Position Checker ━━━

Command: /checkwallet <wallet> <token> [days]

What you get:
• Current holdings & value
• Entry price & unrealized PnL
• Trading history (buys/sells)
• Holding pattern (💎 diamond hands vs 🔴 dumper)
• Wallet risk comparison

Examples:
/checkwallet 7xKXt...abc DezXA...B263 (all time)
/checkwallet 7xKXt...abc DezXA...B263 30 (last 30 days)

Type `/guide wallet` for position analysis guide

━━━ ⚖️ Wallet Comparison ━━━

Command: /comparewallets <wallet1> <wallet2> [days]

What you get:
• Portfolio comparison (value, diversity)
• Trading patterns (💎 diamond hands vs paper hands)
• Performance (total PnL, win rate)
• Best/worst trades
• Risk profile comparison

Examples:
/comparewallets 7xKXt...abc 9yZPq...xyz (all time)
/comparewallets 7xKXt...abc 9yZPq...xyz 30 (30 days)

Type `/guide walletcompare` for comparison guide

━━━ 🏆 Wallet Reputation ━━━

Command: /reputation <wallet> [days]

What you get:
• Reputation score (0-100): Overall trading skill
• Classification (🧠 Smart Money, 🎲 Degen, etc.)
• Win rate across all trades
• Average ROI & total PnL
• Top gainers & worst losers

Examples:
/reputation DYw8j...NSKK (all time)
/reputation 0x742d...bEb0 90 (last 90 days)

Reputation Tiers:
✅ 80-100: Elite trader (Smart Money)
🟢 60-79: Good trader (Solid/Diamond Hands)
🟡 40-59: Average trader (Learning)
🔴 0-39: Poor trader (Degen)

Supports Solana, Base, Ethereum, Arbitrum, Polygon, Optimism, Avalanche
07:22
In reply to this message
━━━ 📊 Portfolio Tracking ━━━

Add to portfolio: /addposition <token_address>
View portfolio: /portfolio
Remove from portfolio: /removeposition <token_address>

What you get:
• Real-time portfolio value tracking
• Individual token PnL (Profit & Loss)
• Total portfolio performance
• Entry prices & current prices
• Percentage gains/losses per token
• Multi-chain support

Example:
/addposition DezXAZ8z7PnrnRJjz3wXBoRgixCa6xjnB7YaB1pPB263
/portfolio → See all your holdings with live PnL

Benefits:
✅ Track multiple positions in one place
✅ Real-time profit/loss calculations
✅ Historical performance tracking
✅ Multi-chain portfolio aggregation

━━━ 🔔 Real-Time Alerts ━━━

Create alert: /createalert
View alerts: /listalerts
Delete alert: /deletealert <id>

Alert Types:
🔴 Price Drop — Get notified when price drops >X%
🟢 Price Pump — Get notified when price pumps >X%
💧 Liquidity Drop — LP removed or unlocked
🐋 Whale Movement — Large holder buying/selling
⚠️ Risk Change — Risk score increases
👥 Holder Change — Significant holder distribution change

Example:
/createalert → Follow interactive setup
• Select alert type (e.g., "Price Drop")
• Set threshold (e.g., 15% drop)
• Choose tokens (portfolio, specific, or high-risk)

Benefits:
✅ Never miss critical price movements
✅ Automated 24/7 monitoring
✅ Customizable thresholds per token
✅ Instant Telegram notifications
✅ Snooze/dismiss functionality

━━━ 🐋 Whale Alerts ━━━

Start tracking: /watch <token_address> [note]
View watchlist: /watchlist
Stop tracking: /unwatch <number>
Add note: /tag <number> <your_note>

What you get alerted about:
🔴 Massive sells (>10% of holdings - mega whale)
🟠 Whale sells (2-10%)
🟡 New whale enters top 10
🔴 Whale exits top 10
🟢 Accumulation (>5% increase)

Alert frequency:
• 🔥 HIGH (1 min) — Active trading, volatile tokens
• ⚡ MEDIUM (5 min) — Default monitoring
• 🐢 LOW (15 min) — Long-term holds

Type `/guide whale` for whale alert setup guide

━━━ 💡 Quick Info Keywords ━━━

Type these in chat for instant info:
CA PRICE BUY LINKS TOKENOMICS

━━━ 🎯 Pro Tips ━━━

1. Always scan before buying — Even if you trust the source
2. Add to portfolio — Track all your positions with /addposition
3. Set price alerts — Never miss critical price movements
4. Scan multiple times — Build trend data over days
5. Check LP lock status — >80% secured is minimum
6. Watch Gini coefficient — >0.70 is whale-dominated
7. Compare similar tokens — Find the safest option
8. Use whale alerts — Know when big holders are moving
07:22
In reply to this message
━━━ 📚 Educational Content ━━━

Learn to spot rugs: /lesson
Take a quiz: /quiz [lesson_id]
Browse lessons: /lessons [filter]
Track progress: /myprogress

What you'll learn:
🍯 Honeypot detection
💸 Dev token dumps
💧 Fake liquidity tricks
📦 Bundle manipulation
📊 Fake volume signals
📈 Pump and dump patterns
🎭 Token impersonation

Earn reputation:
🏆 +2 reputation for perfect quiz scores!

━━━ 🏆 Win Cards ━━━

Generate win card: /wincard <token_address>
View your cards: /wincards

What are win cards?
Celebrate when you call a rug early! If you scanned a token with high risk (≥70) and it dumped >20%, generate a shareable win card with:
• Your original scan date and risk score
• How much the token dumped
• Social sharing buttons (Twitter, Telegram)

Requirements:
✅ Must have scanned token before it dumped
✅ Token must have dumped ≥20%
✅ Your scan risk score must be ≥70

Example:
/wincard DezXA...B263 → Generate win card if eligible

━━━ 🚩 Community Moderation ━━━

Flag suspicious token: /flag <token_address> <reason>
Vote on flags: /vote <flag_id>
View pending flags: /flags
Appeal a flag: /voteappeal <flag_id>

How it works:
• Flag tokens you believe are scams/rugs
• Community votes: Agree, Disagree, Need More Info
• 10 agrees = token gets blacklisted
• Blacklisted tokens show warning on all scans

Reputation-based voting:
• Higher reputation = more vote weight
• Prevents spam/manipulation
• Build trust through accurate calls

Example:
/flag DYw8j...NSKK Confirmed honeypot - cannot sell

━━━ 📖 Detailed Guides ━━━

/guide scan — How to interpret scan results
/guide compare — Token comparison strategies
/guide wallet — Wallet position analysis
/guide walletcompare — Wallet comparison guide
/guide whale — Whale alert setup and management
/guide portfolio — Portfolio tracking and management
/guide alerts — Setting up real-time alerts

━━━ 🆘 Need Help? ━━━

• Commands not working? Check your spelling
• Token not found? Verify the address is correct
• Want to suggest features? DM @CryptoRugMunch

━━━ 🐦 X/Twitter Integration ━━━

Link your X account: /linkx @yourhandle
Check link status: /linkx
Unlink: /unlinkx

How it works:
1️⃣ Run /linkx @yourhandle here in Telegram
2️⃣ Follow @MarcusRugIntel on X
3️⃣ Auto-verified — you're linked!

Once linked, mention @MarcusRugIntel on X with a contract address:
• 🐋 Whale tier: Full scan result posted on X
• 💎 Holder tier: Teaser + redirect to Telegram
• 🆓 Free: Link prompt

Example X post:
@MarcusRugIntel scan CXCWuX...pump

Marcus replies directly on X with analysis! 🗿

C
12:41
Crypto Rug Muncher
Who remembers when CZ, in a fit of rage and jealousy over Hyperliquid's success, backed and created Aster, a "decentralized exchange" that was supposed to compete for market dominance?

It didn't take long before the community discovered that Aster's volume was suspiciously mirroring perp pairs on Binance itself. The manipulation was so obvious that DefiLlama took the extraordinary step of delisting the exchange entirely.

To this day, the Aster team has done nothing to update their APIs so the community can verify that the volume is real and not just wash trading. They've provided zero transparency regarding their data and its authenticity. To make things even worse, Aster is incredibly supply controlled with over 70% of tokens sitting in just 5 wallets.

Aster will go down in history as a defining moment when the community finally woke up and realized the lengths CZ would go to, legitimate or otherwise, to maintain his dominance over every aspect of the crypto space.
👍 4

🚀 Welcome to the Devs Nightmare Bot! 🚀

I'm your advanced Solana token analysis assistant. Here's what I can do for you:

1. 🔍 Token Analysis:
- Scan any Solana token address for detailed information
- View token metadata, creator details, and DEX presence

2. 👥 Team Tracking:
- Analyze token team behavior and holdings
- Track creator and team member wallet activities
- Receive alerts on significant team sell-offs

3. 📊 First Buyers Analysis:
- Examine the behavior of early token adopters
- View a visual representation of top buyers' holdings

4. 💼 Portfolio Management:
- Track multiple tokens simultaneously
- Access a personalized dashboard of your tracked tokens

5. 🔔 Real-time Notifications:
- Get instant alerts on major team movements
- Stay informed about your tracked tokens' performance

To get started, simply send me a Solana token address, and I'll provide you with comprehensive insights!

Use /home to access your tracked tokens dashboard.

Happy analyzing! 📈

I'm your advanced Solana token analysis assistant. Here's what I can do for you:

1. 🔍 Token Analysis:

4. 💼 Portfolio Management:
- Track multiple tokens simultaneously
- Access a personalized dashboard of your tracked tokens

5. 🔔 Real-time Notifications:
- Get instant alerts on major team movements
- Stay informed about your tracked tokens' performance

To get started, simply send me a Solana token address, and I'll provide you with comprehensive insights!

Roman League Tier System

Crypto Rug Muncher
CZ discovers the Solana Syndicate!

It seems CZ has just now discovered the Solana Syndicate after they've been using his likeness to scam people for months. He actually believes them to be "competitors" when in reality they're just low-level grifters who exploit whatever meta is trending to expand their reach and push their scams.

The irony here is incredible. By tagging their account in his article, CZ has done more to amplify the Syndicate's reach than if he had simply ignored them. When people click through to these accounts and engage with their content in any way, they become part of the scam network and will be targeted with future scams.

Nothing helps a scammer more than getting called out by someone with millions of followers who don't understand how these networks operate or the damage they're actually causing by giving them attention.

https://x.com/cz_binance/status/2018949826994401464

Crypto Rug Muncher
The facts still remain that Aster is a CZ backed project and heavily funded by him and a company he controls. Aster's trading volume mirrored that of Binance perps and was at one point delisted from DefiLlama as a result. To this day, nothing has been done to improve the API and data on the platform so the community can verify that its not wash trading.

Finally, Leonard the "CEO" is not even fully doxxed and remains a non-entity who primarily serves his masters at Binance through his project's relationship with CZ-owned Yzi labs. For a decentralized exchange the token is heavily centralized with 70% of the supply contained in just 5 wallets. They were planning a monthly 1% unlock on about 30% of that supply but they have since backtracked on it in response to cratering price.

No FUD has been addressed in this post just more of the same CZ style deflection. Send Aster to 0.

Crypto Rug Muncher
Tether Founder Brock Pierce's Dark 8-Year Friendship with Jeffrey Epstein

New Epstein files reveal Tether founder Brock Pierce maintained a close friendship with convicted pedophile Jeffrey Epstein from 2010 until Epstein's final arrest in 2019. Here's what the emails show:

• Pierce met Epstein in 2010 at a failed conference on Little Saint James. Their relationship quickly evolved from business to personal, with Pierce and Epstein regularly exchanging advice on women, investments, and legal troubles. Emails show them trafficking women together, with Epstein asking Pierce to "take photos and find me a present" during trips to Ukraine. Pierce responded "Will do :-)" and sent dozens of photos back.

• Epstein invested $3 million in Coinbase through Pierce in 2014. Pierce asked permission to reveal Epstein's identity to Coinbase founders, meaning they knew exactly who was funding them. That investment potentially netted Epstein's estate over $100 million by the IPO.

• Pierce asked Epstein for "dirt" on Jeff Herman, a lawyer representing Epstein's victims. He also requested Epstein's "favorite investigator" and got legal help from Epstein when he failed to pay taxes for five years. Epstein also reviewed Noble Bank agreements, the Puerto Rico entity Pierce started that briefly served as the main bank for Tether.

• Pierce introduced Epstein to Steve Bannon in 2016/2017. The two plotted schemes together including new cryptocurrencies and disrupting dollar hegemony.

• Pierce remained loyal to Epstein until the end. Emails from 2018 show Pierce telling Epstein "love you" while inviting him to boats "full of Ukraine's finest."

HT to @Protos for their detailed reporting on this story and breaking it down so succinctly. Read the full story here:

https://protos.com/brock-pierces-dark-and-disturbing-friendship-with-jeffrey-epstein/

23:23
Harald
In reply to this message
BTC is trading in a broad bottoming range around 66k–57k, where a mean reversion is likely. The market is much closer to a bottom than to further major downside, but there’s still no confirmed reversal yet.

Higher timeframes matter most right now. The 3-month chart is leaning toward 60k–57k, with key moving averages sitting in that zone. What happens after a 3-month close around there will define the next structure. Until we see a clear monthly or 3-month reversal or consolidation, timing a turn is guesswork.

There’s also a macro risk: the S&P 500 still shows downside potential on higher timeframes, which would impact crypto if it plays out.

Potential local bottom ranges (could take time):

BTC: 66k–57k

SOL: 55–40

ETH: 1600–1400

Advice: sit tight, don’t try to catch a falling knife. If the 3-month timeframe leads, building a new setup can take a long time.

Big wild card: if the USA starts buying ~200k BTC yearly, that changes everything — but until then, charts usually tell the truth.

Key reminder: higher timeframes rule lower ones. Daily → weekly, weekly → monthly. We’re waiting for confirmation that a turn is coming.
👍

Aurelius 06.02.2026 04:36:35
BTC Crash Analysis — Feb 5, 2026

📉 The 30-Day Chart

$97K ┤      ╭╮
$93K ┤─╮   ╭╯╰╮
$90K ┤ ╰───╯   ╰─╮
$89K ┤             ╰──────╮
$86K ┤                     ╰╮
$84K ┤                      ╰╮
$78K ┤                       ╰╮
$76K ┤                        ╰╮╭╮
$73K ┤                          ╰ ╰╮
$64K ┤                             ╰── ← YOU ARE HERE
     └─────────────────────────────────
     Jan 6            Jan 20        Feb 5

Peak-to-current: $97K → $64K (▼ 34% in 3 weeks)
ATH ($126K, Oct 2025) → Now: ▼ 50%
Today alone: ▼ 12.4% — worst single-day since the FTX collapse.


🔍 What Caused It

Not one trigger — a perfect storm:

1. Institutional exodus — ETF outflows have been relentless: $7B in Nov, $2B in Dec, $3B+ in Jan. Smart money has been quietly exiting for months.
2. Liquidity vacuum — Order books are paper-thin. Small sells trigger cascading liquidations. $1B+ liquidated in 24h, $980M of that was longs getting annihilated.
3. Broken narratives — Gold rallied 60%+ in 2025 while BTC dumped. "Digital gold" thesis is on life support. Correlation with equities also collapsed.
4. Regulatory stall — The CLARITY Act is stuck in Congress. The regulatory tailwind that compressed volatility in 2024-2025 has reversed.
5. Broad risk-off — Silver -14% today, software stocks crushed (IGV -24% YTD), S&P and Nasdaq red. Not crypto-specific.
6. Strategy (MSTR) bleeding — $6.5B unrealized loss. If they're forced to sell, that's a nuke.

🎯 Where's the Bottom?

Key Support Levels:

| Level     | Why It Matters                                                                                      |
| --------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| $58K–$60K | 200-day MA + realized price (avg cost basis of ALL BTC holders). Multiple analysts converging here. |
| $55K–$56K | Pre-election price floor. If this breaks, it's panic territory.                                     |
| $48K–$50K | Nuclear scenario — only if $58K fails with volume.                                                  |

Technical Signal:
RSI is at 17 — the third most oversold reading in BTC's entire history. Only the 2018 bear market bottom and the 2020 COVID crash saw lower. Historically, readings this extreme preceded violent bounces.

My read: The $58K–$60K zone is the line in the sand. It's where the 200-day MA, realized price, and institutional cost basis all converge. If that holds, this is a savage but healthy correction in a broader bull market. If it breaks with conviction — buckle up, because $50K is next.

But with RSI at 17 and $1B in longs already liquidated... a lot of the leverage has been flushed. Dead cat bounce territory at minimum. 🗿

"The object of life is not to be on the side of the majority, but to escape finding oneself in the ranks of the insane." — and today, the insane were leveraged 10x long.

CZ is mocking retail at this point. He has no idea what being poor actually means and doesn't seem to care about the damage his bucket shop exchange has done to the market and the people who use it. Maybe he'll finally learn what poor actually means and develop some empathy for the retail traders he's been fleecing for years when they lock him up again. DevsNightmarePro by @REKTsol_bot
🚀 Welcome to the Devs Nightmare Bot! 🚀

I'm your advanced Solana token analysis assistant. Here's what I can do for you:

1. 🔍 Token Analysis:
- Scan any Solana token address for detailed information
- View token metadata, creator details, and DEX presence

2. 👥 Team Tracking:
- Analyze token team behavior and holdings
- Track creator and team member wallet activities
- Receive alerts on significant team sell-offs

3. 📊 First Buyers Analysis:
- Examine the behavior of early token adopters
- View a visual representation of top buyers' holdings

4. 💼 Portfolio Management:
- Track multiple tokens simultaneously
- Access a personalized dashboard of your tracked tokens

5. 🔔 Real-time Notifications:
- Get instant alerts on major team movements
- Stay informed about your tracked tokens' performance

To get started, simply send me a Solana token address, and I'll provide you with comprehensive insights!

Use /home to access your tracked tokens dashboard.

Happy analyzing! 📈
View Tracked Tokens
